text.title: XP Extreme Programming Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we want to do XP" to "the practices are operative + scored quarterly".

step.name: assess
step.action: Score each of the 12 practices (0–5) with evidence. Identify substrate score (tdd + ci + small_releases).
step.decision-gate: If org hostile to process (refuses to budget for adoption) — STOP, verdict block-org-hostile.

step.name: adopt-substrate
step.action: Phase-1 work: raise tdd + ci + small_releases scores to ≥3. Add Done definition. Wire CI gate.
step.decision-gate: Substrate avg < 3 after 4 weeks — STOP, escalate.

step.name: adopt-flow
step.action: Phase-2 work: raise refactor + simple_design + sustainable_pace scores. Drop overtime norm. Introduce iteration retros.
step.decision-gate: Sustainable pace failing — STOP, fix overtime culture before continuing.

step.name: adopt-craft
step.action: Phase-3 work: raise pair + collective_ownership + metaphor + planning_game + on_site_customer scores. AI-pair counts where human-human pair impossible.
step.decision-gate: Adoption regress on substrate — STOP, return to phase-1.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.action: Re-score quarterly. Surface declining practices. Adjust phase based on signals.
step.decision-gate: last_reviewed > 120 days — bump verdict to stale.
